summary: Iteration 119: Complete testing of P0 bug fixes for profile matching and client CRUD. All 44 tests passed (100%). Two P0 bugs verified fixed: (1) _extract_profile_base now correctly generates UNIQUE keys for different dimensions (FLAT 120X12 → PIATTO120X12, FLAT 120X7 → PIATTO120X7). (2) Client POST/PUT endpoints use Pydantic validation with model_validator to strip null values and apply defaults.

profile_matching_p0_fix.test: FLAT 120X12 and FLAT 120X7 produce different keys
profile_matching_p0_fix.result: PASS - FLAT 120X12 → PIATTO120X12, FLAT 120X7 → PIATTO120X7 (26 unit tests)

client_create_with_nulls.test: POST /api/clients/ with null values for optional fields
client_create_with_nulls.result: PASS - Pydantic model_validator strips nulls, applies defaults (persona_fisica=False, contacts=[], client_type='cliente')

client_create_extra_fields_ignored.result: PASS - Extra fields silently ignored (ConfigDict extra='ignore')

duplicate_piva_detection_400.test: POST /api/clients/ with duplicate P.IVA same type
duplicate_piva_detection_400.result: PASS - Returns 400 with message 'Esiste già un record con questa Partita IVA'

duplicate_piva_different_types_409.test: POST /api/clients/ with duplicate P.IVA different type (cliente vs fornitore)
duplicate_piva_different_types_409.result: PASS - Returns 409 suggesting conversion to Cliente/Fornitore

client_update_success.result: PASS - City and phone updated correctly

client_update_piva_duplicate_check.result: PASS - Returns 400 for duplicate P.IVA on update

client_get_list.result: PASS - Returns clients list with total count

client_filter_by_type.result: PASS - Filters correctly, returns only fornitore/cliente_fornitore

client_delete.result: PASS - Client deleted, subsequent GET returns 404

contacts_nested_nulls.test: POST /api/clients/ with contacts array containing null values
contacts_nested_nulls.result: PASS - Nested nulls stripped, defaults applied

standard_profiles.result: PASS - Standard profiles use family + main size only

dimension_space_collapse.result: PASS - Spaces around X correctly collapsed

bug_1_profile_matching.description: FLAT 120X12 and FLAT 120X7 were both mapped to PIATTO120X12
bug_1_profile_matching.fix: _extract_profile_base now collapses spaces around X in dimensions and includes full dimensions for flat/tube/angle profiles
bug_1_profile_matching.verification: 26 unit tests pass, key tests: test_flat_different_thicknesses_unique, test_flat_120x12, test_flat_120x7

bug_2_client_creation.description: Client creation failed with 400/422/500 errors due to null value handling
bug_2_client_creation.fix: ClientCreate and ClientUpdate models use model_validator(mode='before') to strip null values before Pydantic validation
bug_2_client_creation.verification: 14 API tests pass including null value handling, extra fields ignored, duplicate P.IVA detection

success_rate.backend: 100% (44/44 tests passed: 18 new iteration119 tests + 26 existing profile_matching tests)

test_credentials: Created test user 'test_user_iter119_*' with session - cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Test clients created with TEST_ prefix - all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 119 verified two P0 bug fixes: (1) Profile matching: _extract_profile_base in /app/backend/routes/commessa_ops.py correctly generates unique keys for different dimensions (FLAT 120X12 → PIATTO120X12, FLAT 120X7 → PIATTO120X7). (2) Client CRUD: ClientCreate and ClientUpdate models in /app/backend/models/client.py use model_validator to strip null values. The client POST/PUT endpoints in /app/backend/routes/clients.py use these Pydantic models for validation. All 44 tests pass.
